title: bus.rs: RedisSubscriber::recv silently drops deserialization errors — receiver task exits
description: In RedisSubscriber::recv (relay/src/bus.rs), serde_json::from_str(&payload).ok()? silently maps a deserialization error to None, which returns None from recv(). The caller (bus subscriber loop in ws.rs) interprets None as 'channel closed' and terminates. A single malformed or unexpected message on the Redis pub/sub channel ('nie:relay:bus') will permanently kill cross-instance delivery for the rest of that relay process's lifetime, with no error log and no recovery. The fix is to log the error and continue rather than mapping to None.
